properties.displayName: [ADE] Deny NICs with public IP addresses
properties.description: Denies (or audits) network interfaces that have a public IP address associated directly. In hardened environments all external ingress must flow through a load balancer, Application Gateway, or Firewall.

metadata.description: 'Audit' flags non-compliant NICs. 'Deny' blocks creation of NICs that carry a public IP. 'Disabled' turns the policy off.
